description: Systematic outreach to CM digital nomads and founders not yet in the network. Sources: Facebook groups, LinkedIn, coworking spaces. Goal: invite to events, WhatsApp/Telegram groups, and newsletter. Track all conversions in CRM.
target_segment: Digital nomads and founders currently in Chiang Mai or frequently visiting. Not yet in our WhatsApp/Telegram groups or on our RSVP list.

acquisition_sources.targeting_criteria: Recent posts/comments showing they are active in CM, mention of running a business, freelancing, or remote work
Location: Chiang Mai (current) OR recent posts geotagged CM. Title contains: founder, CEO, freelancer, consultant, creator, nomad. Connection degree: 2nd preferred

acquisition_sources.method: Partnership with venue staff to mention event / leave flyers, or direct approach to members working there
After each event, ask attendees to invite 1-2 people they know in CM. Track via referral code.

sequences.name: Facebook Group — Cold DM
sequences.notes: Send from personal/founder account. Keep brief. No mass spam — max 10-15 DMs/day per account.

steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}} — saw you in {{shared_group}}, looks like you're based in CM right now.

I run a weekly founders event here on Thursdays — ~40 vetted founders, 20-min expert talks, curated networking. It's free, happens at a rotating secret venue in Nimman.

Thought you might be into it. RSVP here if you want in: [RSVP_URL]

Also happy to add you to the WhatsApp group if you prefer — it's where the community lives between events.

Hey {{first_name}} — just following up on the invite. We had [COUNT] founders last Thursday — solid room.

If you're in CM and want in, just reply here or grab a spot at [RSVP_URL]. Or I can just add you to the WhatsApp group directly.
Hey {{first_name}} — looks like we're both in CM. I run a weekly founders event here (Thursdays, verified crowd). Would be good to connect.

Thanks for connecting, {{first_name}}.

In case it's useful — I run CM Founders, a weekly Thursday event for founders and digital nomads here. About 40 vetted people per event, 20-min expert talks, curated networking.

It's free and open to the right people. You can grab a spot at [RSVP_URL] or I can add you to our WhatsApp group directly.

What are you working on while you're in CM?

Hey {{first_name}} — just wanted to make sure this didn't get lost. If the event timing works, we'd love to have you. If not, no worries — happy to stay in touch regardless.

Either way, looking forward to crossing paths in CM.

sequences.name: Coworking Space — In-Person / Follow-Up
sequences.notes: Use after meeting someone at a coworking space. Follow up via WhatsApp (preferred in CM) or email if you have it.

steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}}, great meeting you at {{coworking_space}} today.

As mentioned — I run a weekly founders event on Thursdays in Nimman. ~40 vetted people, free to attend, rotating secret venue. RSVP here: [RSVP_URL]

Also sending you a WhatsApp invite to the community group — it's where we stay connected between events.

sequences.name: Referral Invite
sequences.notes: Sent to contacts referred by existing community members. Warmer tone, reference the referrer.

steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}} — {{mutual_connection}} suggested I reach out.

I run CM Founders — a weekly Thursday event for founders and nomads in Chiang Mai. We vet everyone who attends so the room stays high-signal. {{mutual_connection}} thought you'd fit right in.

Grab a spot here: [RSVP_URL] — or just reply and I'll manually add you.

sequences.name: Post-RSVP Nurture (Newsletter + Group Invite)
sequences.notes: Triggered automatically when someone submits the RSVP form. Handled by N8N (already partially set up via rsvp/route.ts webhook).

steps.subject: You're in — here's what happens next
steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

You're on the list. Here's what to expect:

1. Our team reviews RSVPs within 24 hours
2. If approved, you'll get access to the private WhatsApp + Telegram groups with the weekly venue
3. Events run every Thursday, 6:00 PM (presentations at 6:30 PM sharp)

In the meantime, follow us on Instagram/LinkedIn for event previews and content clips: [SOCIAL_LINKS]

See you Thursday.

steps.subject: Approved — join the WhatsApp group
steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

You're approved for CM Founders.

Join the community here:
- WhatsApp: [WHATSAPP_INVITE_LINK]
- Telegram: [TELEGRAM_INVITE_LINK]

Venue for this Thursday will be posted in the group by Wednesday evening.

Welcome.

steps.subject: How was your first CM Founders event?
steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

Hope you made it out Thursday — would love your honest take.

Two questions:
1. What did you think of the event?
2. Is there anyone in CM you think should be in the room?

If you want to bring someone, just forward them this link: [RSVP_URL]

See you next Thursday.

n8n_webhook_fields.referrer: name of community member who referred
